items.title: Altcoins, Stablecoins, Tokenized Stocks Drove July’s Crypto Gains, Binance Says
items.description: The crypto market cap rose 13% in July with ether leading altcoins higher, stablecoins overtaking Visa and tokenized stocks surging 220%, Binance Research said.

items.title: Al Gore’s Investment Firm Sells Amazon Stock, Exits Mastercard, and Buys Visa
items.description: Generation Investment Management slashed two-thirds of its Amazon investment, sold all its Mastercard stock, and doubled down on Visa.

items.title: Americans Pull Back From an Epic Credit-Card Binge
items.description: Credit-card spending is growing more slowly than debit-card spending for the first stretch in years.
